name: unite-group
description: Unite-Group — the single canonical monorepo for the entire Unite-Group product and ecosystem. apps/web is the product; everything else supports it.

scripts.verify:web: cd apps/web && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run type-check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.verify:workspace: cd apps/workspace && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run check && pnpm run build
scripts.verify:mcp: cd packages/pi-ceo-operator-mcp && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run verify:web && npm run verify:workspace && npm run verify:mcp
